regions.description: ISO-4217 numeric currency code -> payment scheme metadata + scam note

evOperators.description: Curated allowlist of official EV-charging and parking-operator payment domains (verified, sourced). Match on eTLD+1 or listed subdomain - never substring. Soften charger/parking warnings only on HTTPS + exact match; unknown domains on charger-pattern QRs stay hardened.

compat.v1: Frozen shape: {code: {symbol,name,country,scheme,scamNote}}. Never remove or rename keys; only add entries or fix values. Breaking shape changes go to /v2 with a new manifest entry.
